# Every @unchecked Sendable or nonisolated(unsafe) site must be listed here with
# a rationale. This keeps strict-concurrency escapes visible in review.
Sources/LatticeMinerCore/ProofOfWork.swift|private struct SendableSearchArgs: @unchecked Sendable {|SHA256 midstate is copied into worker arguments and not mutated after task creation.
Sources/LatticeMiningCoordinator/MiningWorkerProcess.swift|private final class MiningWorkerSubprocess: @unchecked Sendable {|Owns one Foundation.Process whose lifecycle is confined to a single search call; cancellation only invokes its synchronized termination path.
Sources/LatticeNode/Architecture/NodeSQLite.swift|final class NodeSQLite: @unchecked Sendable {|SQLite is opened FULLMUTEX and every operation uses that serialized handle without exposing it.
Sources/LatticeNode/Architecture/IvyContentBridge.swift|public final class AttributionCapture: @unchecked Sendable {|All access to the optional attribution value is guarded by AttributionCapture's NSLock.
Sources/LatticeNode/Architecture/IvyContentBridge.swift|private final class Trace: @unchecked Sendable {|All mutable attribution state is guarded by Trace's NSLock.
Sources/LatticeNode/Architecture/IvyContentBridge.swift|private final class Context: @unchecked Sendable {|The root CID is immutable and the referenced Trace synchronizes its own mutable state.
Sources/LatticeNode/Architecture/NodeNetworkRuntime.swift|private final class RuntimeCallbackEpoch: @unchecked Sendable {|Every read and increment of the callback generation is guarded by the epoch's NSLock.
Tests/LatticeMiningCoordinatorTests/MiningCoordinatorTests.swift|nonisolated(unsafe) static var responder: ((URLRequest) -> (Int, Data))?|The URLProtocol test stub installs and clears this callback serially within each test.
Tests/LatticeNodeTests/Architecture/NetworkTrustTests.swift|private nonisolated(unsafe) static var allocated = Set<UInt16>()|The issued test port set is read and mutated only while holding its static NSLock.
Tests/LatticeNodeE2ETests/ParentChildE2ETests.swift|private final class LoopbackTCPFaultProxy: @unchecked Sendable {|All proxy lifecycle, listener, counters, and session-map mutation is guarded by the proxy's NSLock.
Tests/LatticeNodeE2ETests/ParentChildE2ETests.swift|private final class Session: @unchecked Sendable {|Socket descriptors are immutable and exactly-once close state is guarded by the session's NSLock.
